ops.body: W4 shipped as 66702e78 (CI green, 757 pytest + 46 node): rank/finalize capture inputs_fp at work start (contract parity with journeys.run; tests proven honest against a simulated revert); StateConflictError messages self-locate (prefs path, trips dir); outbound window miss computed from the preference's own {start,end} both sides — papercut cases verified (7/15 → no miss, 7/19 → 3 days past end); window_overshoot leg fact deleted (zero consumers, disagreed with the preference-relative miss); walker failed nodes carry stderr_tail (first-attempt tail survives a null retry) and exit-3 first attempts back off 60s via an injectable fail-loud seam. Review PASS; all four minor/nit findings accepted and applied. W3 (bridge connections, task 0436605) in flight — opus xhigh implement + fable review.
